title: The Pyramid Principle: Logic in Writing and Thinking
author: Barbara Minto
description: The definitive guide to structured business communication from McKinsey's first female consultant. Barbara Minto's Pyramid Principle teaches a top-down approach to organizing ideas — starting with the conclusion, then supporting it with logically grouped arguments. The book introduces the MECE principle and SCQA framework, which together form the backbone of consulting-style communication worldwide.
